full_quote: Kyle, as the lead UX designer, acquired and developed in-house UX talent which is integral towards creating best of breed customer experience design on retail mobile banking app. He worked hand-in-hand with technical development team to create customer experience design that delivers both functionality and mobile app’s theme of helping customers’ everyday financial chores easy. I would not hesitate to work with him in the future endeavors.
name: Soe Hla Win
